excluded.advanced_llm (dev account): live LLM decisions - no deterministic signal function to backtest
excluded.llm_recommendations (account 1): live LLM decisions - no deterministic signal function to backtest
excluded.entry strategies (lump sum/DCA/...): capital-deployment rules, not portfolios - tested in entry_strategies.py across start-date cohorts instead
excluded.decumulation rules (4% + overlays): withdrawal framework - tested in entry_strategies.py --withdrawal-rate instead
excluded.overnight/intraday legs: need open prices; engine is close-to-close - tested in overnight_decomposition.py instead
excluded.options/VRP strategies: no historical chain data yet (awaiting user's data purchase)
